response.justification: Chen brings 20 years of technical experience and current engagement with AI-agent infrastructure through MCP work, demonstrating builder capability and technical breadth. However, the role requires strategic AI platform expertise with demonstrated shipped products—his resume shows hands-on engineering strength but limited evidence of deep AI/ML systems architecture, strategic customer advisory roles, or director-level strategic leadership. The recent MCP work is promising but too narrow in scope compared to the principal-level positioning required.
strengths: 20 years of technical experience across web, mobile, desktop, and infrastructure with proven ability to ship and maintain products
Currently engaged with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP development, showing recent exposure to cutting-edge AI tooling and agentic workflows
Strong entrepreneurial track record as GISCollective founder; demonstrates ability to build and steward platforms and open-source initiatives
concerns: Minimal demonstrable expertise in AI/ML platforms or machine learning systems; no evidence of building, training, or deploying ML models or AI products at scale
Background is primarily hands-on engineering (current title: Staff engineer) rather than director-level strategic leadership or recognized customer advisory experience
No advanced degree in AI-related field; both degrees are in CS and photography/imaging, lacking the specialized AI/ML credentials preferred for this principal-level role

key_factors.factor: Strong Technical Builder with Shipped Products
